args:
set -eu
rg -n 'gemm_fp8|_custom_ops|all_reduce_utils|shm_broadcast|shm_object_storage|kv_events' \
  vllm/csrc/cpu/sgl-kernels/gemm_fp8.cpp \
  vllm/vllm/_custom_ops.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/device_communicators/all_reduce_utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/device_communicators/shm_broadcast.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/device_communicators/shm_object_storage.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_events.py >/dev/null
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/native.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/shrink.bundle_tamper_verify.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json | jq -e '.outTrace and .summary.mode == "run"' >/dev/null
printf 'shrink-vllm-native-runtime\n'
